description: The CT Cranium DICOM scan is already loaded in InVesalius 3. An endocrinologist has requested the dimensions of the pituitary fossa (Sella Turcica) to check for enlargement or Empty Sella Syndrome. Measure the maximum Anterior-Posterior (AP) diameter of the Sella Turcica (the saddle-shaped depression in the sphenoid bone) from the tuberculum sellae to the dorsum sellae. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/sella_measurement.inv3. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
